package rulecoverage

func PositivePasswordStoredAsPlaintext() string {
    ruleID := "password_stored_as_plaintext"
    family := "security"
    severity := "error"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "struct fields named `Password`, `Passwd`, or `Pwd` stored as `string` in database model structs without evidence of hashing"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
